title: BAI Issues Form-1 Circular for Indian Badminton Players
indian_angle: This circular directly affects Indian badminton players requiring Form-1 for administrative purposes.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued a circular regarding the issuance of Form-1 for sportspersons.

title: BAI President Sarma on Monkeys at India Open
indian_angle: The statement comes from the President of the Badminton Association of India regarding a domestic event.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma made a comment regarding monkeys attending matches at the India Open.

title: Indian Shuttlers Need to Develop Independent Play
indian_angle: This article provides an opinion on the development and performance strategy for Indian badminton players.
summary: An opinion piece suggests Indian badminton players should cultivate self-reliance and win matches without constant coaching presence.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System for Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This is a significant rule change specifically for domestic badminton tournaments and national championships in India.
summary: The 3x15 scoring system will be implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and National Championships for U-13, U-15 & U-17 categories, debuting in Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: A prominent Indian male singles player reached the final of an international Super 300 tournament.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to secure the title.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: An Indian player achieved a significant upset victory against a top-ranked international opponent at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan caused an upset by defeating the World No 6 player at the US Open.
